# A Leading Metal Buildings Provider In The U.S.

[Our Products](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop) [Design Your Own](https://www.eaglecarports.com/start-designing-your-metal-building)

[Scroll to main content area](https://www.eaglecarports.com/#welcome)

![Eagle Carports Equipment](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/welcome-bg-1920x1080.webp)

## Welcome To Eagle Carports

In business for over 25 years, Eagle Carports is your premier destination for custom metal structures. We manufacture over **50,000 buildings per year** between our **six manufacturing facilities** across the U.S. We offer the highest quality service, and require the highest standards of customer service. Our self-supporting steel structures are economical and convenient. If you’re looking to protect your car, recreational vehicle, boat or farm equipment, or looking for something custom, contact [Eagle Carports](https://www.eaglecarports.com/#form) today!

[![Metal Carport](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/metal-carport-builder.webp)](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop/category/metal-carports "Metal Carports")

[![Metal Barn](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/metal-carports-metal-barn-raleigh.webp)](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop/category/metal-barns "Metal Barns")

[![Metal Garage](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/metal-garage.webp)](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop/category/metal-garages "Metal Garages")

[![Metal Combo Unit](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/metal-buildings.webp)](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop/category/metal-combo-units "Metal Combo Units")

[![Metal Commercial Building](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/metal-commercial-building-contractor.webp)](https://www.eaglecarports.com/shop/category/metal-commercial-buildings "Metal Commercial Buildings")

![Eagle Carports Equipment](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/best-sellers-1920x1080.webp)

## Eagle Buildings By The Numbers

1996

Established in 1996 and now one of the leading Metal Building Manufacturers in the US.

13.5

In 2020, we produced over 13.5 MILLION feet of tubing!

220

We've grown to provide jobs for over 220 of the best employees!

559,000

7 Distribution Warehouses Totaling Over 559,000 square feet.

850+

Over 850 Authorized Dealer Lot Locations

## OUR 3D ESTIMATOR NOW INCLUDES A NEW  FEATURE!

![Eagle Carports Financing Options](https://www.eaglecarports.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/pay-it-you-way.webp)

## Looking To Pay It Your Way?

We know being able to finance your metal carport – _regardless of your credit score_ – is vital. That’s why we have secured the most reputable credit companies in the industry. We’re making it easy and affordable to purchase the steel building that best covers your needs.

[Learn more](https://www.eaglecarports.com/financing/rent-to-own) about the process or use our calculator below for instant numbers!

## Rent-to-Own Calculator

## Testimonials

Very punctual , guys knew what they were doing and had my new 22'×30 building , finished in half a day!

**Response from the owner:** Hi, James. Your feedback is highly appreciated. Thank you for the review!

![Home](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXs-sAj4202DaC7DH4Sb9SlJbDXam0xa2a-O8csNa2Vofbnnw_bkw=s56-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100)

1 month ago

I haven’t gotten my carport built yet, but Karla has been awesome! She’s been a huge help dealing with permitting. Thanks a ton Karla!

Post carport install report: Wow! Permit was just approved a week ago. Scheduling called Tuesday and asked if install was good for Thursday, 3/5. These guys rolled in and knocked a 30x24 out in 7 hours! Add in a few discrepancies on my end and they adjusted with no issues. I have been nothing but impressed from start to finish! Eagle Carports has been amazing! Duran installations are the hardest and fastest working individuals I’ve ever met. Thank you for the great work Juan, Jose, and Ray!

**Response from the owner:** Hi, Jaydeebeee. We are thrilled to learn that you had a positive experience with us!

**Response from the owner:** Hi, Randy. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!

Highly recommend!

A few scheduling conflicts, due to weather, were addressed quickly. The crew worked tirelessly and efficiently. They showed up on time and communication was great. A few details needed to be addressed after the completion to which Beth Darisse(customer service manager) handled quickly and professionally. There are so many of these companies to choose from, it can be overwhelming, do your research! By doing so, I think you will find Eagle Carports will come out on top.

**Response from the owner:** Hi, John. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!

**Response from the owner:** Hi, John. We appreciate the kind words and are glad we could provide you with a positive experience!

![Home](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJezR4EfArjiAtxmYAYI6hhNJ_p5SqYKRdQEatb6AN9jT347w=s56-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100)

[Anita D.](https://search.google.com/local/reviews?placeid=ChIJJ3Cq4s47UogRbJ9QPfOTaVs)

2 months ago

Our building is beautiful! 1st installers noticed one of the doors wasn't right so he contacted company to replace. Plans were made by the company to replace sent crew out with new door. For whatever reason this was not the right door. Contacted company and began working with Beth. She was amazing! Sent her pics of the problem and she made things right! Now it took awhile but that wasn't her or the company's fault mother nature decided to ice us in during this ordeal. Looking forward to using this building for many years to come. Thanks Beth for a wonderful response to our problem!

**Response from the owner:** Hi, Anita. Thanks for taking the time to share your positive experience. We truly appreciate it!

![Home](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLs-bx1g6pYWZFI22EDd5EBFaCaKJREdic3mKPGxNFkn0WP1Q=s56-c-rp-mo-br100)

[Britt R.](https://search.google.com/local/reviews?placeid=ChIJJ3Cq4s47UogRbJ9QPfOTaVs)

2 months ago

Sheri Carr is an outstanding Business Development Consultant and a true asset to the Eagle dealer network. She wears a lot of hats—dealer training, ongoing support, and dealer oversight—and she handles all of it with consistency and professionalism.

What sets Sheri apart is that she actually listens. She takes feedback seriously, welcomes ideas, and follows through. Anytime we’ve needed guidance, she’s been available and proactive about helping us find solutions.

As new Eagle dealers, having Sheri in our corner has made a real difference. Her support from day one has been a big part of our early success, and I’d recommend her to any dealer new or old looking to grow and operate at a higher level. A true asset to Eagle Carports, Inc.

[Tony D.](https://search.google.com/local/reviews?placeid=ChIJJ3Cq4s47UogRbJ9QPfOTaVs)

2 months ago

Outstanding Experience with Eagle Carports – Tracy, Tabatha, and the Entire Corporate Team

We couldn’t be happier with our experience working with Eagle Carports and their corporate office team in North Carolina. We’ve completed two Eagle buildings with them — the first a 65’ x 45’, and the second a 45’ x 80’ — and both projects exceeded our expectations.

The quality is excellent, the pricing is competitive, and the entire process was handled with a level of professionalism that’s hard to find today.

What truly sets Eagle Carports apart, however, are Tracy and Tabatha. These two went above and beyond — far beyond. They invested an incredible amount of time with us — nearly a year of planning, conversations, revisions, and questions — to make sure every detail was exactly right. At no point did we feel rushed or brushed off. They listened, they cared, and they delivered precisely what we envisioned.

These buildings are not just buildings to us. They are a place where our family gathers, where we entertain, work on our cars, and spend meaningful time together. This was something we dreamed about for many years, and Eagle Carports helped turn that dream into reality.

If you’re looking for quality structures and a team that genuinely cares about getting it right — especially people who will take the time to understand what the building means to you — I can’t recommend Eagle Carports, Tracy, Tabatha, and their entire team highly enough.

First-class experience from start to finish.

**Response from the owner:** Hi, Tony. Thank you so much for leaving us a stellar review!
